creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello Ronald,

unfortunately, there hasn't been any activity on your problem report on
print/ghostview (see [1]) for quite a while. What is the state of this
issue? Are you still seeing the problem you described, or should this PR
be closed? If the problem still exists: Is it really FreeBSD-specific, or
is ghostview crashing on other systems (e.g. Linux), too?

Best regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/162045
